name: Shilajit (Mineral Pitch)
usesInAyurveda: Tridoshic Modulation: Pacifies all three doshas.
mainMedicinalUses: The 'Conqueror of Mountains' - a master rejuvenator.
Boosts stamina, testosterone, and physical strength.
Used for diabetes, asthma, and chronic fatigue.
plantProfile: Exudate from Himalayan rocks rich in fulvic acid.
preparationMethods: Small portion dissolved in warm milk.
safetyProfile: MUST use only purified Shilajit. Consult an expert.
